message:
Visual refresh of supporting UI components across web app

Comprehensive styling update bringing all secondary components in
line with the new design language established in the core component
redesign (indigo accents, bolder typography, motion animations).

Desktop components:
- Hero: Enhanced gradient background, larger typography, staggered
  entrance animations for headline and CTA buttons
- Footer: Refined spacing, updated link styles, consistent color
  palette with indigo accents
- ActiveFilterChips: Rounded pill chips with hover scale effects
- AnimatedCounter: Simplified animation logic, cleaner spring config
- BundleCard: Richer card layout with hover elevation and glow
- PromptGrid: Streamlined grid layout, reduced wrapper complexity
- RelatedPrompts: Updated card styling and spacing to match redesign
- SpotlightSearch: Enhanced search overlay with backdrop blur and
  smoother transitions
- MagneticButton: Minor prop interface refinement
- theme-toggle: Updated icon animations and hover states

Mobile components:
- BottomTabBar: Redesigned tab indicators, updated icon styling,
  consistent touch target sizing
- SwipeablePromptCard: Refreshed card appearance for swipe interface

Featured:
- staff-pick-badge: Updated badge styling with gradient refinement
  and size variant support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
